name: Jedi Hunter
official_rules_text: When a unit with the Jedi Hunter keyword attacks a unit with a /unie906 upgrade icon on its upgrade bar, the attacking unit gains c:b until the end of that attack.
description: When a unit with the Jedi Hunter keyword attacks a unit with a /unie906 upgrade icon on its upgrade bar, the attacking unit gains c:b until the end of that attack.
